captions: turn on the button next to next
turn on icon to the left of next button
launch icon at the bottom left corner

1440, 1970], "visibility": "visible", "content-desc": [null], "rel-bounds": [0, 0, 1440, 1718], "focused": false, "selected": false, "scrollable-vertical": false, "children": [{"text": "Mail is a powerful free email client for Android. 

Its improved features include: 

	â€¢  Push mail using IMAP IDLE
	â€¢  Better performance
	â€¢  Message refiling
	â€¢  Email signatures
	â€¢  Bcc-to-self
	â€¢  Folder subscriptions
	â€¢  All folder synchronization
	â€¢  Return-address configuration
	â€¢  Keyboard shortcuts
	â€¢  Better IMAP support
	â€¢  Saving attachments to SD
	â€¢  Empty Trash
	â€¢  Message sorting
	â€¢  …and more


Please note that Mail does not support most free Hotmail accounts and, like many mail clients, has some quirks when talking to Microsoft Exchange. 

Please submit bug reports, contribute new features and ask questions at https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.genimax.molligeni.
